title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how entrepreneur Alex Hormozi uses AI in his businesses, outlining a four-pillar system: data as competitive advantage, voice-first approaches before AI implementation, breaking up workflows, and compound effects. The video also highlights a mistake Hormozi's teams made that required executive intervention.
